objective: Stratégie sur IMXUSDC 1h. Objectif: Génère un plan de stratégie original pour une pair_wise combination unique d'indicateurs sur le timeframe horaire (1h) dans le marché IMXUSDC. Analysez la diversité des axes "non battus" ainsi que les comportements aleatoires imposés. Utilisez au moins un filtre horaire de liquidite, une combinaison de signaux contradictoires avec vote majoritaire et une hypothese testable pour l'analyse comparative. Évaluez la robustesse des familles detectees: breakout, momentum, mean-reversion.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy proposed involves using multiple indicators such as RSI, EMA and ATR for entry and exit points. The fallback contract is also suggested to maintain progress when the LLM cannot be exploited. However, it's not clear how these filters will perform in live trading conditions. Additionally, there seems to be no consideration given to transaction costs or slippage which could impact profitability.
[Backup plan] 1) Implement a stress test on this strategy using historical data to evaluate its robustness and identify potential weaknesses that may arise during live trading. 2) If results are poor (negative return), adjust the RSI, EMA and ATR filters to increase sensitivity or specificity based on market conditions. 3) If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), experiment with different combinations of indicators or explore alternative strategies such as mean-reversion or breakout in order to improve returns without significantly increasing risk.
